status.recipeName: TikTok Wrap Hack — Crunchwrap Supreme Edition
status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2-3 minutes (full, operator-tuned); excerpt for short video

fields.title: Fold the Crunch
fields.styleOfMusic: Funky nu-disco pop with tight slap bass, crisp handclaps on two and four, and bright brass stabs; verses stay playful and talk-sung with dry close vocals, pre-chorus adds filtered guitar chops and a rising talkbox swell, chorus bursts wide with stacked harmonies and a sticky four-word hook. Sprinkle vinyl crackle, triangle bells, and a short breakbeat fill before each chorus drop. Punchy modern mix with warm saturation and glossy top-end sheen., funk, pop, disco
fields.excludeStyles: No mumble rap, no death metal, no lo-fi bedroom, no EDM big-room drop, no sad piano ballad, no country twang, no reggaeton dembow, no bossa nova, no tutorial jingle, no artist imitation, no advertising-style spoken voice, no voice-over narration, no real artist reference, no brand names, no recipe tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics about a viral tortilla wrap hack turned crunchwrap supreme: a radial cut, four colorful quadrants, a folding cascade, sizzling taco beef, sour cream silk against crunchy chips, melted cheese, and a golden grilled triangle that steams on the counter. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, software names, or social media references.

Mood: playful, glossy, tactile, triumphant, food-video ASMR energy, but not childish.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hooks, occasional parenthetical echoes like "(fold the crunch)". Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- radial slit opening a flat flour circle into four corners
- rust spice dust blooming on hot beef crumb
- lettuce green, tomato red, cream white, chip gold in a color wheel
- fold cascade lifting, crossing, tucking into a thick triangle
- skillet hiss, press, single flip, leopard-gold crust, cheese peek at the seam
- intact golden triangle steaming on the terrazzo island

Must include naturally: fold the crunch, quarterfold, radial cut, cumin snow, prism crunch, golden triangle, cheese peek, tortilla thunder, mascot smile.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Flat circle, one brave slit, four corners waiting for color.

[Pre-Chorus]
Spice dust on heat; the compass fills with crunch and cream.

[Chorus]
Big chantable hook around folding the crunch, golden triangle, cheese peek. Repeat the hook.

[Verse 2]
Lift, cross, tuck; layers hide then hug; the puck gets thick.

[Pre-Chorus 2]
Pan hiss, press, flip once, steam rising off the shell.

[Chorus]
Repeat the hook with crackle, steam, or shine in one new image.

[Bridge]
Half-time swagger: crunch versus cream; hands off the plate.

[Final Chorus]
Biggest gang vocals; proud held note over the warm kitchen glow.
fields.shortVersionPlan: For a 45-90 second vertical edit after the full master exists: open on instrumental pre-chorus swell (about 4 bars) under radial-cut B-roll; hard-cut to Chorus 1 from the first hook line through the end of the chorus; use Verse 2 bars 1-8 over quadrant-fill and fold montage; jump to Chorus 2 full; end with a 4-bar instrumental tag on the final hook syllable while the grilled triangle hero holds silent for the last 2 bars. Fade under kitchen ASMR tail. No new lyrics after the final chorus.

instructions.voice: Playful lead with light talk-sung verses; stack gang vocals on chorus; keep consonants crisp for ASMR-friendly transients. Do not imitate any real artist or protected voice.
instructions.structure: Generate the long form first, aiming for 2-3 minutes after operator edits; chorus must survive a 45-90 second vertical cut.
instructions.workflowNotes: Suno is manual. Paste fields in Custom Mode. Align downbeats to fold cascade and grill flip in Recipe2Video assembly.

autoLyricsPrompt: Opening line: change "Write original English song lyrics" to "Write original 2-3 minutes English song lyrics".
Lyric style line: after "Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit", add ", but make a 2-3 minutes song".
Structure header: change "Structure:" to "Extend this structure to fit a 2-3 minutes song:"

qualityChecks: Title is first field in markdown mirror and JSON fields.
Style of Music contains only musical production direction with no 2-3 minutes suffix.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is English, image-driven, under 3000 characters, and avoids recipe tutorial wording.
Lyric style line ends with the exact 45-90 second excerpt clause for operator replacement.
instructions.fullSongOperatorEdits documents three lyrics edits and styleOfMusicSuffix.
No real artist, protected voice, brand, or social media instruction is requested.
Short version plan aligns with radial cut, quadrant fill, fold, grill, and hero triangle.
